prediction.reasoning: Based on ITW's historical volatility of approximately 20-25% annually, I estimated a 6-day standard deviation of around 3.2%. The point estimate assumes slight upward momentum typical of quality industrial stocks. Confidence intervals are constructed assuming normal distribution of returns, with the 50% CI capturing ±1.3%, 80% CI capturing ±2.6%, and 90% CI capturing ±3.4% moves from the point estimate.
